user_intent_preservation.original_goal: Migrate the 3-phase motor inverter PWM from GTM/TOM on TC3xx to EGTM/ATOM on TC4D7 (KIT_A3G_TC4D7_LITE) using the unified IfxEgtm_Pwm driver.
user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: Generate center-aligned 20 kHz complementary PWM for three phases (U/V/W) with 1 µs deadtime, independent duty updates per phase, synchronized start and synchronized updates, and a single PWM-period interrupt serviced on CPU0 (TOS=IfxSrc_Tos_cpu0, priority=20). Use EGTM Cluster 1, ATOM1 channels 0/1/2 for U/V/W with HS active-high, LS active-low; route outputs to P20.8/P20.9 (U HS/LS), P20.10/P20.11 (V HS/LS), P20.12/P20.13 (W HS/LS). Configure EGTM GCLK=200 MHz, enable FXCLK and CLK0, select FXCLK_0 for ATOM, and CMU Clock0 for DTM/CDTM.
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Use the unified high-level IfxEgtm_Pwm driver to configure EGTM Cluster 1 ATOM1 channels 0/1/2 as one base + two synchronous channels with complementary outputs and hardware dead-time via DTM/CDTM. Set up EGTM clocks with IfxEgtm_Cmu to enable FXCLK and CMU CLK0 and select FXCLK_0 for ATOM timing and CMU CLK0 for DTM. Map ATOM TOUT pins with IfxEgtm_PinMap_setAtomTout. Start channels synchronously with IfxEgtm_Pwm_startSyncedChannels and perform duty updates per phase using IfxEgtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDuty (sync) or IfxEgtm_Pwm_updateChannelDutyImmediate as needed. Install a single period ISR on CPU0 using IfxCpu_Irq_installInterruptHandler and invoke IfxEgtm_Pwm_interruptHandler in the ISR.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: Unified high-level driver supports advanced multi-channel synchronized PWM, complementary pairs with dead-time, center-aligned operation, and synchronized start/update. It matches TC4xx EGTM and is available in the template.

runtime_function.name: updateEgtmAtom3phInvDuty
runtime_function.purpose: Update U/V/W duty independently at runtime; use synchronous update for applying new duties at the next PWM period boundary.

isr_function.name: interruptEgtmAtomPeriod
isr_function.purpose: Single PWM period ISR on CPU0 (priority 20) that services the PWM end-of-period event and can trigger control-loop tasks.

driver_changes: IfxGtm_Pwm -> IfxEgtm_Pwm (unified PWM driver, GTM to EGTM)
IfxScuWdt.h -> IfxWtu.h (watchdog header, if watchdog handling is required)

api_changes.reason: Project function rename for TC3xx->TC4xx and TOM->ATOM migration

migration_notes.context_preserved: The solution keeps the original control objectives: 3-phase center-aligned 20 kHz complementary PWM on EGTM Cluster 1 ATOM1 ch0/1/2, 1 µs deadtime via DTM/CDTM, HS active-high and LS active-low, synchronized start and synchronized duty updates, and one period ISR on CPU0 with priority 20. Clocks are prepared to use GCLK=200 MHz with FXCLK_0 for ATOM and CMU CLK0 for DTM. Output pins are assigned via IfxEgtm_PinMap_setAtomTout, with a specific note to verify the exact IfxEgtm pin map macros for P20.8/9/10/11/12/13 on KIT_A3G_TC4D7_LITE as the provided macros are assumed and need confirmation in IfxEgtm_PInMap.h.
